instruction: The shopping cart icon has two copies of the thin black frame square. Remove the duplicate.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/shopping-cart.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 3h1.386c.51 0 .955.343 1.087.835l.383 1.437M7.5 14.25a3 3 0 0 0-3 3h15.75m-12.75-3h11.218c1.121-2.3 2.1-4.684 2.924-7.138a60.114 60.114 0 0 0-16.536-1.84M7.5 14.25 5.106 5.272M6 20.25a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Zm12.75 0a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="4" y="4" width="120" height="120" />
  <rect id="frame-dup" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="-8" y="4" width="120" height="120" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/shopping-cart.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 3h1.386c.51 0 .955.343 1.087.835l.383 1.437M7.5 14.25a3 3 0 0 0-3 3h15.75m-12.75-3h11.218c1.121-2.3 2.1-4.684 2.924-7.138a60.114 60.114 0 0 0-16.536-1.84M7.5 14.25 5.106 5.272M6 20.25a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Zm12.75 0a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Z"/></g>
  <rect id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="4" y="4" width="120" height="120" />
</svg>
